mapper.select: select m.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, am.name as model_name, am.model_type from cook_ai_messages m left join cook_users u on u.id = m.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_ai_models am on am.id = m.model_id where m.id = #{id} and m.deleted_at is null

select m.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, am.name as model_name, am.model_type from cook_ai_messages m left join cook_users u on u.id = m.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_ai_models am on am.id = m.model_id where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and m.deleted_at is null order by m.created_at asc, m.id asc

select m.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, am.name as model_name, am.model_type from cook_ai_messages m left join cook_users u on u.id = m.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_ai_models am on am.id = m.model_id where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and m.user_id = #{userId} and m.deleted_at is null order by m.created_at asc, m.id asc
mapper.sql: select s.conversation_id, s.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, s.model_id, am.name as model_name, am.model_type, min(case when s.role = 'user' then s.content end) as title, substring_index(group_concat(s.content order by s.created_at desc, s.id desc separator ' || '), ' || ', 1) as last_message, sum(case when s.role = 'assistant' then 1 else 0 end) as rounds, coalesce(sum(s.input_tokens), 0) as input_tokens, coalesce(sum(s.output_tokens), 0) as output_tokens, coalesce(sum(s.input_tokens), 0) + coalesce(sum(s.output_tokens), 0) as total_tokens, max(s.response_time_ms) as response_time_ms, max(case when s.role = 'assistant' then s.rag_hit end) as rag_hit, max(case when s.role = 'assistant' then s.fallback_reason end) as fallback_reason, case when sum(case when s.flag = 'violation' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'violation' when sum(case when s.flag = 'warning' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'warning' else 'normal' end as flag, max(s.flag_reason) as flag_reason, min(s.created_at) as created_at, max(s.created_at) as updated_at from cook_ai_messages s left join cook_users u on u.id = s.user_id and u.deleted_at is null left join cook_ai_models am on am.id = s.model_id
mapper.select: where s.user_id = #{userId} and s.deleted_at is null group by s.conversation_id, s.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, s.model_id, am.name, am.model_type order by updated_at desc

select t.question from ( select trim(content) as question, count(1) as ask_count, max(created_at) as last_asked_at from cook_ai_messages where role = 'user' and deleted_at is null and trim(content) != '' group by trim(content) ) t order by t.ask_count desc, t.last_asked_at desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update cook_ai_messages set flag = #{flag}, flag_reason = #{reason}, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and deleted_at is null
